commands.name: graph
commands.description: Run static call-graph analysis (rules, entry points, catalog summary in one report)

commands.name: graph-lookup
commands.description: Look up function occurrences by simple name from the persisted catalog

commands.name: graph-symbol-index
commands.description: Emit a symbolindex.json artifact (name→file:line and file→names) from the persisted catalog

commands.name: graph-baseline-export
commands.description: Export the graph gate baseline (JSON) from the datastore to a file

commands.name: graph-shard-worker
commands.description: [internal] Build one shard from a spec file and emit a ShardBuildResult JSON (spawned by the sharded build)

commands.name: catalog-export
commands.description: Run graph analysis and write the CatalogExport JSON document (symbols + edges + provenance) to a file

commands.name: sarif-export
commands.description: Run graph analysis and write OpenSIP-convention SARIF v2.1.0 findings to a file
